item.title: Top Vatican cardinal calls US-Israeli strikes 'truly alarming'
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
VATICAN CITY, March 4 - The Vatican's top diplomat warned on Wednesday that the ongoing U.S.-Israeli attacks on Iran undermine international law and said nations do not have a right to launch \"preventive wars\", in an unusually direct criticism of the military campaign.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: US lawmakers set to vote on war powers as Iran conflict widens
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 4 - Lawmakers in the U.S. Senate were set to begin voting on Wednesday on a bipartisan war powers resolution aiming to stop the military campaign against Iran and require that any hostilities against it be authorized by Congress.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Missile launched from Iran towards Türkiye destroyed: Ankara
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
The missile, launched from Iran, was heading towards Turkish airspace through Iraq and Syria.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Iran intelligence operatives signalled openness to talks with CIA to end war, NYT reports
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
March 4 - Operatives from Iran's Ministry of Intelligence signalled openness to the U.S. Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) to talks on ending the war, the New York Times reported on Wednesday, citing officials briefed on the matter.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: After Iran’s warning, Europe fails to unite on war launched by US, Israel
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The bloc is split over how to respond, but some EU members are rallying around the concept of mutual defence.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: ‘We were just praying’: Pakistani students recount escape from war-hit Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Iran hosts some 3,000 Pakistani students, who stare at an uncertain future after US-Israel attacks forced them to flee.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Analyst says interest in Epstein files plummeted after war on Iran launched
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Republican US Congressman Thomas Massie has said the war 'won’t make the Epstein files go away'.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Trump's Iran attack rattles Russian hardliners who call for Putin to double down on war in Ukraine
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Hegseth says U.S. sub sank Iranian warship off Sri Lanka
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
GALLE, Sri Lanka, March 4 - A U.S. submarine sank an Iranian warship off the southern coast of Sri Lanka, U.S. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth said on Wednesday.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US carried out strike on Iranian warship off Sri Lanka coast, officials say
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
WASHINGTON, March 4 - The U.S. military carried out a strike that sank an Iranian warship off Sri Lanka's coast and triggered a rescue for dozens of Iranian sailors by Sri Lanka's navy, three U.S. officials told Reuters on Wednesday.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran war breaks UN Charter, strike on school shocking, UN probe says
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
GENEVA, March 4 - An independent United Nations probe investigating rights violations in Iran condemned on Wednesday attacks by Israel and the United States on Iran as well as Tehran's retaliatory strikes across the region, saying they violated the UN Charter.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Malta-flagged container ship hit by projectile in Hormuz, vessel abandoned, sources say
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
LONDON, March 4 - The Maltese-flagged container ship Safeen Prestige was damaged by a projectile as it sailed towards the top of the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday, prompting its crew to abandon ship, shipping sources said.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Hungary foreign minister hopes Russia will free two ethnic Hungarian prisoners of war during talks
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BUDAPEST, March 4 - Hungary's Foreign Minister Peter Szijjarto said on Wednesday that he hopes two ethnic Hungarian prisoners of war will be freed by Russia during his talks in Moscow, where he is scheduled to meet Russian President Vladimir Putin later.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Jesus will still love you as you age, says Vatican as it warns against cosmetic surgery
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Cosmetic surgery can lead to a “cult of the body”, says a new text approved by Pope Leo.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: An outlier for condemning Israel’s Gaza genocide, Spain says no to Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Spain's socialist president is locked in a war of words with Washington, which has threatened to cut trade ties.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Turkey says NATO defences destroyed missile from Iran headed towards its airspace
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The marks the first time that NATO member Turkey has been drawn into the expanding conflict in Iran.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Sub-tenant sues Hao Mart over early termination of Taste Orchard lease
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
The beauty salon Belovie is the only sub-tenant to have filed a lawsuit against former master tenant Hao Mart.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US submarine sank Iran’s warship off Sri Lanka coast, says Hegseth
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Sri Lanka says it recovered several bodies and rescued 32 wounded sailors after the frigate sank.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Explainer: Are the US attacks on Iran legal?
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Critics say the attacks exceed the US president’s authority and fail to comply with international law.
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Spanish PM says ‘no to war’ in Middle East
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Spanish PM Pedro Sanchez said Spain opposes war against Iran and urged the US, Iran and Israel to pursue a resolution.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Number of Iranian missiles and drones fired at Gulf countries
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
March 4 - Here are statistics released by Gulf defence ministries on drones and missiles that Iran has fired at their territories since the start of the U.S.-Israeli air war against Iran:
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: AI takes centre stage at Mobile World Congress in Barcelona
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Beyond product showcases, attention at the event also turned to how artificial intelligence should be deployed transparently and responsibly as it becomes more embedded in networks and services.
Matched: ai(+3), artificial intelligence(+3)

item.title: Lebanon sucked deeper into war as Hezbollah, Israel trade blows
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Israel's defence minister said he had authorised the military to take control of more positions in Lebanon.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: How Iran fights an imposed war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Regime's strategy is not battlefield victory but raising the regional and global costs of any attempt to overthrow it.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)
